PersonalDetails.invalid_phone: Please enter a valid phone number

About.title: Your Reliable Global Concierge, Anytime, Anywhere
About.description: BlackCardHouse provides 24/7 access to premium, personalized services wherever you are. Our team of dedicated assistants crafts exclusive, luxury experiences tailored to your lifestyle.
About.description_extra: Enjoy priority access to world-class hotels, acclaimed restaurants, premier events, and much more.

Hero.title: Elevate Your Lifestyle with Bespoke Concierge Services
Hero.description: BlackCardHouse delivers curated experiences tailored to your every need, where every detail is managed with precision, speed, and personal attention.

CTA.title: Direct VIP Access via Telegram
CTA.description: Whether you're planning a journey, booking a world-class restaurant, or seeking access to exclusive events, our concierge service provides instantaneous personal support.

Chat.title: Concierge Support at Your Fingertips
Chat.description: Whenever you have a question or need assistance with your plans, our team is just a message away. Experience swift and personalized support through a simple chat.

ContactUs.title: Get in Touch
ContactUs.description: Please complete the form below, and our concierge team will reach out to you shortly.

ContactForm.subject: Subject
ContactForm.success: Your message has been sent successfully!

Order.title: Order Concierge Service
Order.description: Enter your details and select your membership plan to begin your concierge journey.

Service.description_new: Select from our range of premium concierge memberships, designed to provide seamless access to the world's most exclusive experiences.
Service.description_existing: Choose the premium concierge service that best fits your current requirements.

Marketplace.title: Concierge Marketplace
Marketplace.description: Enhance your lifestyle with our curated selection of premium services and unique experiences. From everyday essentials to extraordinary events, we handle every detail.

Payment.title: Payment Method
Payment.info: We accept all major credit cards. Your transaction is processed through a secure, encrypted gateway for your peace of mind.
Payment.currency_info: Transactions are processed in your selected currency. Supported currencies: {currencies}. Please note that your bank may apply additional fees for currency conversion.

Terms.read_and_accept: I have read and agree to the <link>Terms of Service</link>

travel.title: Bespoke Travel
travel.description: From luxury hideaways to private island escapes, our travel specialists craft seamless, curated itineraries tailored to your every whim.

luxury_transportation.title: Elite Transportation
luxury_transportation.description: Experience unparalleled comfort with bespoke mobility solutions, including private aviation, chauffeur services, and luxury yacht charters.

fine_dining_and_nightlife.title: Refined Dining & Social Life
fine_dining_and_nightlife.description: Secure exclusive access to the world’s most sought-after restaurants, Michelin-starred culinary experiences, and premier social events.

luxury_goods.title: Exclusive Acquisitions
luxury_goods.description: Entrust our specialists with the sourcing of rare collectibles, haute couture, and limited-edition luxury goods from around the globe.

daily_access.title: Ad-Hoc Daily Access
features: Full concierge access for chosen dates
Perfect for vacations or intense periods
Access to all services during active days

request_access.title: Request-Based Access
features: Ideal for occasional or niche needs

RefundPolicy.title: Refund & Cancellation Policy
RefundPolicy.description: This policy outlines the principles for refunds and cancellations regarding services acquired through BlackCardHouse.
RefundPolicy.membership_info: Concierge memberships and access packages are generally non-refundable once activated. Unused access during the service period does not entitle the client to restitution or credit.
RefundPolicy.third_party_info: Specific bookings, events, or third-party services may be subject to additional cancellation terms. In such instances, the terms of the respective provider shall apply.
RefundPolicy.operational_info: Should BlackCardHouse be unable to fulfill a service due to internal operational reasons, a full or partial refund or credit may be issued at our discretion.
RefundPolicy.contact_info: For refund inquiries, please contact us at:

PrivacyPolicy.title: Privacy Policy
PrivacyPolicy.description: This policy explains how BlackCardHouse collects, utilizes, and safeguards your personal data.
PrivacyPolicy.data_info: Information we may collect includes your full name, email address, telephone number, Telegram username, billing and delivery details, and any other information you provide to us.
how_we_use_items: To provide services and manage your requests
PrivacyPolicy.payment_info: BlackCardHouse does not store or process credit card information; payments are handled via authorized third-party payment providers.
PrivacyPolicy.sharing_info: To the extent necessary for service delivery, your data may be shared with third-party hotels, transport companies, event organizers, or payment partners.
PrivacyPolicy.rights_info: Subject to applicable laws, you may request access to, correction of, or deletion of your data.

TermsOfService.title: Terms of Service
TermsOfService.intro: BlackCardHouse is a premium lifestyle management and concierge service operated by The Illustrious Company Limited, registered in the United Kingdom. These terms govern your access to our website, services, and communication channels, including Telegram.
TermsOfService.agreement: By utilizing our services, you acknowledge that you have read, understood, and agreed to these terms.

sections.title: 1. Scope of Service
sections.content: BlackCardHouse provides travel planning, luxury transportation, bespoke reservations, event access, personal shopping, and on-demand concierge support. All services are subject to availability, local regulations, and the conditions of third-party providers.

sections.title: 2. Packages & Payment
sections.content: All fees are payable in advance. Memberships do not renew automatically unless explicitly stated otherwise.

sections.title: 3. Eligibility
sections.content: To utilize our services, you must be at least 18 years of age and possess the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts.

sections.title: 4. Client Obligations
items: Provide accurate and up-to-date contact information
Respond promptly to requests for confirmation or additional information
Review bookings and arrangements prior to final confirmation

sections.title: 5. Third-Party Providers
sections.content: Many concierge services are fulfilled through independent third-party providers. BlackCardHouse acts as an intermediary for these services.

sections.title: 6. Acceptable Use
sections.content: Services may only be used for lawful and ethical purposes. Illegal, abusive, or inappropriate requests may be declined.

sections.title: 7. Liability
sections.content: To the fullest extent permitted by law, BlackCardHouse is not liable for indirect or consequential damages.

sections.title: 8. Intellectual Property
sections.content: Content within our website and services belongs to BlackCardHouse or respective right holders.

Metadata.home_description: Access travel, luxury transportation, exclusive restaurant reservations, and bespoke lifestyle solutions with BlackCardHouse.

Success.title: Payment Successful
Success.email_info: A confirmation email with your active service details has been sent to your inbox.
Success.telegram_info: One of our concierge specialists will contact you via your provided Telegram username shortly. Whether it's travel planning, exclusive reservations, or luxury procurement, support is now just a message away.
Success.contact_info: For additional inquiries, reach our support team at:

Fail.title: Payment Failed
Fail.error: Regrettably, your payment could not be processed at this time.
Fail.contact_info: If the problem persists, please contact our support team at:

Chargeback.title: Chargeback Policy
Chargeback.intro: This policy outlines how chargeback requests related to services provided by BlackCardHouse are handled.
Chargeback.contact_before: Clients are required to contact our support team before initiating a chargeback. Most disputes can be resolved more swiftly through direct communication.
Chargeback.documentation: In the event of a chargeback, BlackCardHouse may submit necessary documentation to the payment institution, including order records, payment logs, service descriptions, accepted policies, and relevant communication records.
Chargeback.legal_rights: We reserve our legal rights in cases where a chargeback is initiated without prior contact or based on misleading grounds.

PaymentPolicy.title: Payment Policy
PaymentPolicy.intro: This policy explains the core rules regarding payments for services offered by BlackCardHouse.
PaymentPolicy.services_info: BlackCardHouse currently offers {count} different concierge service packages:
PaymentPolicy.payment_info: All fees are collected in advance. Payments can be made with Visa and Mastercard.
PaymentPolicy.confirmation_info: Once the payment is successfully completed, a confirmation email will be sent to you and our team will get in touch.
PaymentPolicy.contact_info: If you have any questions, you can contact us at:

Partnerships.title: Partnerships
Partnerships.intro: At BlackCardHouse, we collaborate with elite hotels, restaurants, transportation providers, event organizers, and luxury brand partners.
Partnerships.goal: Our goal is to offer high quality, swift communication, and reliable operations to our clients while creating sustainable and valuable collaborations for our partners.
why_items: Long-term and trust-based approach to collaboration
focus_items: Private transfer, aviation, and yacht services
Fashion, jewelry, and limited-edition luxury goods
Partnerships.contact: If you would like to explore partnership opportunities with BlackCardHouse, please contact us at:
